mission.title: backstage: TechDocs: Support README.md or docs/README.md to be treated as docs/index.md
mission.description: TechDocs: Support README.md or docs/README.md to be treated as docs/index.md. Requested by 19+ users.

steps.title: Check current backstage setup
steps.description:
Verify your backstage version and configuration:
```bash
npx backstage-cli info
```
This feature requires a working backstage installation.

steps.title: Review backstage configuration
steps.description:
Review the relevant backstage configuration:
A lot of projects have an existing README.md file which serves as an "index page" for those exploring the repository on GitHub/GitLab/etc.

steps.title: Apply the fix for TechDocs: Support README.md or docs/README.md to be treated…
steps.description:
## Hey, I just made a Pull Request!

In techdocs, add support for using `README.md` or `docs/README.md` as fallback if `docs/index.md` is missing.

This closes #6057

#### :heavy_check_mark: Checklist
```yaml
config["markdown_extensions"].append("mdx_truly_sane_lists")
```

steps.title: Verify the feature works
steps.description:
Test that the new capability is working as expected.
Confirm the feature described in "TechDocs: Support README.md or docs/README.md to be treated…" is functioning correctly.

resolution.summary:
## Hey, I just made a Pull Request!

In techdocs, add support for using `README.md` or `docs/README.md` as fallback if `docs/index.md` is missing.

This closes #6057

#### :heavy_check_mark: Checklist
codeSnippets:
site_name: 'new-new-service'
site_description: 'Main documentation for new-new-service'
repo_url: https://gitlab.com/....../new-new-service
edit_uri: edit/main

plugins:
  - techdocs-core

nav:
  - Overview:
    - What is new-new-service?: 'README.md'

prerequisites.description: A working backstage installation or development environment.
